definitions.text: The time when the Sun is below the horizon when the sky is dark.
examples: Most animals are awake at day and sleep at night.

definitions.text: The period of darkness beginning at the end of evening astronomical twilight when the sun is 18 degrees below the horizon, and ending at the beginning of morning astronomical twilight.

examples: Night, y'all! Thanks for a great evening!

definitions.text: To spend a night (in a place), to overnight.
